mapper.sql: select config_id, integration_name, platform_name, integration_type, endpoint_url, auth_type, auth_credential, sync_frequency, sync_mode, mapping_rule, transform_rule, retry_policy, status, last_sync_time, last_sync_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_external_integration_config
mapper.insert: insert into nc_external_integration_config (integration_name, platform_name, integration_type, endpoint_url, auth_type, auth_credential, sync_frequency, sync_mode, mapping_rule, transform_rule, retry_policy, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{integrationName}, #{platformName}, #{integrationType}, #{endpointUrl}, #{authType}, #{authCredential}, #{syncFrequency}, #{syncMode}, #{mappingRule}, #{transformRule}, #{retryPolicy}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_external_sync_log (config_id, integration_name, request_summary, response_status, success_count, failure_count, duration_ms, error_message, retry_count, sync_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{configId}, #{integrationName}, #{requestSummary}, #{responseStatus}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{syncTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_external_sync_batch (config_id, integration_name, source_system, batch_status, success_count, failure_count, skipped_count, retry_count, request_summary, response_summary, error_message, started_time, finished_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{configId}, #{integrationName}, #{sourceSystem}, #{batchStatus}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{skippedCount}, #{retryCount}, #{requestSummary}, #{responseSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedTime}, #{finishedTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select sync_batch_id, config_id, integration_name, source_system, batch_status, success_count, failure_count, skipped_count, retry_count, request_summary, response_summary, error_message, started_time, finished_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_external_sync_batch where sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId}
mapper.insert: insert into nc_external_sync_payload (sync_batch_id, collection_batch_id, collection_item_id, source_system, external_id, version_hash, payload_content, payload_status, convert_message, converted_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{syncBatchId}, #{collectionBatchId}, #{collectionItemId}, #{sourceSystem}, #{externalId}, #{versionHash}, #{payloadContent}, #{payloadStatus}, #{convertMessage}, #{convertedTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark}) ON CONFLICT (source_system, external_id, version_hash) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: select payload_id, sync_batch_id, collection_batch_id, collection_item_id, source_system, external_id, version_hash, payload_content, payload_status, convert_message, converted_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_external_sync_payload where sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} order by payload_id asc
